title: The Neighsayer 2
description: The Neighsayer is back and these cats still aren’t ready for his hooves.
quote: You say justice is dead. I say neighhh!
altHero: Brian Winddancer, a clydesdale horse as The Neighsayer, with long flowing blonde hair and wearing a denim vest
alt1: The Neighsayer getting ready to fight
alt2: The Neighsayer kicking a ninja cat in the face
alt3: The Neighsayer doing a praying mantis pose as the ninja cat falls down
alt4: The Neighsayer punching another ninja cat in the face
